{{Expand}}

{{Infobox group
| name = Tanakite Worldweavers
| introduced = cradle-13-threshold
}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|The [[Tanakite Worldweavers]] had previously torn [[Yarech]] apart.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c5">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 5</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:Threshold: Stories from Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle groups]]
